message:
test(cell): add 14 unit tests for ColorAttribute type

Coverage expansion:
- cell/color.rs: 0 → 14 tests (ColorAttribute default, equality, clone/copy,
  From<AnsiColor>, From<ColorSpec>, TrueColor variants, debug, hash, variant differentiation)
